contract.objective: Stabilize Lobster Console + lobsterctl submit/status/fetch/verify paths from 'usable' to 'repeatable, low-maintenance' operation

one_click_sequence.note: Console UI provides 1-click prepare+submit, CLI provides 5-command sequence

bounded_status_output.note: Status command returns single-line JSON using bash --noprofile --norc flags

fetch_verify_reproducible.note: fetch/verify run automatically but need Priority 1 artifact precheck improvement

operator_sequence_compressed.note: Minimal sequences documented for both Streamlit UI and CLI methods

closed_loop_verification.note: Contract → Receipt → Gate chain is complete

claims_verified.claim: Status output is bounded and exits cleanly
claims_verified.stability_metric: Implementation uses bash --noprofile --norc to prevent shell noise
Documented 5-command CLI sequence and 1-click UI sequence

permit_gate_bypass_check.note: All verification uses existing permit/gate infrastructure

remaining_risks.description: SSH connection instability may cause status/fetch to fail
remaining_risks.mitigation: Implement retry logic with exponential backoff

remaining_risks.description: Python environment differences across CLOUD-ROOT instances
remaining_risks.mitigation: Add Python version check and virtual environment activation

remaining_risks.description: SCP transfer may corrupt large JSON files
remaining_risks.mitigation: Add checksum verification after artifact download

remaining_risks.description: Too many verification gates may discourage usage
remaining_risks.mitigation: Consolidate redundant checks, provide clear skip options

conditions: Priority 1 fix (artifact precheck) must be implemented before production smoke test
Cloud-ROOT Python environment must be verified before next wave
Verification gate output clarity improvements should be implemented this week
next_steps: Implement fetch artifact precheck in scripts/fetch_cloud_task_artifacts.ps1
Execute smoke task r1-cloud-smoke-20260306-1400 to validate stability
Generate dual gate verification evidence for smoke test execution
Create T3-B overnight runbook based on stable T3-A findings

signature.compliance_notes: All acceptance criteria met except fetch/verify artifact precheck. No unverified stability claims found. Permit/gate infrastructure intact.
